lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor surface scratches but no significant dents or rust. The interior is well-maintained with light signs of regular use. The engine is in good working order and has been serviced according to the recommended schedule.

This vehicle is in impeccable, showroom condition, representing a rare find for the discerning collector. The exterior is absolutely flawless, with the original paint retaining its deep factory luster and showing no signs of wear or road debris. Every panel is perfectly aligned, and the trim is in pristine condition. Mechanically, the car has been maintained to the highest possible standards with a full service history. The interior is spotless, with no wear on the upholstery and all electronics functioning as they did the day it was manufactured. This is a truly mint example that looks and drives like new.
The car is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and minor dents, and the interior shows moderate wear. It is mechanically functional but requires some maintenance.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts and restoration fans! This vehicle presents an incredible opportunity for anyone looking to take on a rewarding project. While it currently requires significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to return to its former glory, it’s a fantastic, budget-friendly canvas for your next big build!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to be safely roadworthy. The exterior shows its age with several large dents, visible rust along the wheel wells, and extensive paint oxidation. Inside, the interior is heavily worn, featuring torn upholstery and a cracked dashboard, while several electronic components, including the air conditioning and power windows, are non-functional. Mechanically, the car starts but runs roughly, with a noticeable engine knock and a transmission that slips under acceleration. It is being sold strictly as-is and would be an ideal candidate for a dedicated project or as a source for parts.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term reliability. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit stands as an exceptional acquisition for the discerning professional. Rigorously inspected to ensure our quality standards, it represents a premier opportunity within its class.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has plenty of life left for its next owner! Whether you're commuting or heading out on a weekend road trip, this beauty handles like a dream and has been super reliable for me. It’s been well-loved and is ready to hit the road today. I’m looking for a quick, easy sale to someone who will appreciate it as much as I have, so come take a look!

This BMW E46 M3 features the legendary S54B32 inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a precise 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox. The chassis integrity is secured with a reinforced rear subframe, while the suspension benefits from refreshed dampers and bushings. Recent preventative maintenance includes a complete VANOS system overhaul and shim-and-bucket valve adjustment to ensure peak volumetric efficiency. Featuring a mechanical limited-slip differential and staggered 18-inch Style 67 wheels, this example offers a visceral, analog driving experience. Mechanically robust with sorted cooling and subframe systems, this driver-focused M3
Used vehicle. Good condition. Clean title. Maintenance up to date. No mechanical issues.

This 2018 Audi Q7 has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive shape for its next owner. The exterior retains a deep, glossy shine, showing only the minor, expected road wear consistent with careful driving and garage storage. Inside, the premium leather upholstery is clean and supple, while the cabin remains a strictly smoke-free environment with all technological features—including the virtual cockpit, panoramic sunroof, and multi-zone climate control—functioning exactly as they should. Mechanically, the vehicle is robust; it comes with a complete, documented service history, shifts through gears seamlessly, and sits on a set of high-quality tires with significant tread remaining. It offers a perfect balance of luxury and reliability, ready for immediate adventure without any pending maintenance concerns.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies reliable performance and sophisticated styling. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Featuring a refined interior and a robust powertrain, it offers a superior driving experience for the discerning owner. We invite you to witness the quality and value of this road-ready selection firsthand.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a refined driving experience and proven reliability. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure its mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal meet our rigorous standards. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a sophisticated balance of performance and long-term value.

Hey! I'm parting ways with my reliable daily driver. It's been such a fantastic car and is still in really solid shape, ready to hit the road with its next owner. I've made sure to keep up with it, so it runs like a charm and looks great too. Perfect for anyone looking for a dependable ride that's been well-loved! Shoot me a message if you're interested!

This example utilizes a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox paired with a torque-sensing variable M differential lock for optimal power distribution. Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well. No issues.

Meticulously maintained and presenting beautifully in its original factory finish, this vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a vibrant luster, showing only the expected minor imperfections from careful road use, while the alloy wheels remain free of significant curbing. Inside, the cabin is a testament to pride of ownership; the premium upholstery is clean and intact, the dashboard is free of cracks, and every power feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the infotainment system—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, it is turn-key ready. It has benefited from regular fluid changes and recent preventative maintenance, ensuring a smooth, quiet ride with responsive handling and firm braking. This is a solid, honest example of a modern classic that has many miles of enjoyment left to offer. Comes with a complete set of keys and a clean title.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection, it demonstrates consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic. Prospective owners can expect a dependable driving experience backed by a history of conscientious care. This is an exceptional opportunity to acquire a high-caliber automobile at a competitive market valuation.

This exceptional vehicle represents a premier balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience that meets rigorous standards. We invite discerning buyers to appreciate the mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation of this well-appointed model.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and it's been such a joy to own. It's in really solid shape and has clearly been well-loved over the years. If you're looking for a dependable car that still looks great and drives smoothly, this is the one for you! I've taken great care of it, and I'm sure you'll love it just as much as I have. Come say hi and take it for a spin!

Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well. Firm price.

Up for sale is a dependable and well-cared-for vehicle that strikes the ideal balance between value and performance. The exterior presents beautifully with a deep gloss, showing only the expected minor stone chips from light highway use. Inside, you'll find a pristine, non-smoker cabin with comfortable seating and intact trim. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system, works perfectly. Under the hood, the car is mechanically robust, having recently received a comprehensive multi-point inspection, fresh oil, and new brake pads. It drives straight and true with no unusual noises or vibrations. This is a solid, honest car that has been maintained with an open checkbook and is ready for many more miles of worry-free driving.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that balances mechanical integrity with refined aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for safety and performance. Offering a superior driving experience and exceptional long-term value, this vehicle represents a premier choice for the discerning buyer seeking quality without compromise.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, which represents an exceptional synthesis of performance and sustained mechanical integrity. Maintained to a high standard, this automobile offers a refined driving experience and aesthetic presence consistent with its careful stewardship. Having undergone a comprehensive professional evaluation, it stands as a testament to enduring quality and remains a premier choice for the discerning motorist who prioritizes reliability and value.

Hey everyone! I’m parting ways with my reliable daily driver, and it’s honestly such a gem. It’s been well-loved and is in great shape, ready to hit the road with a new owner! It drives like a dream and is super comfy for those long commutes. If you're looking for a solid, dependable car that still looks sharp, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Used car in good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean title. Reliable daily driver. No major mechanical issues.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and utility. The exterior features a deep metallic finish that retains a high gloss, with only minor, age-appropriate imperfections that do not detract from its overall curb appeal. Inside, the leather upholstery remains supple and free of major wear or tears, complemented by a fully functional suite of modern electronics and a premium sound system. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; it has been serviced regularly at authorized centers, with a comprehensive maintenance log available for review. The engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the tires have significant tread remaining. This is a reliable, high-performing automobile ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking mechanical excellence and refined aesthetics. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this automobile delivers consistent performance and remains in commendable condition throughout. It stands as a testament to responsible ownership, offering a sophisticated driving experience and exceptional value at its current market position.
